programmes.show_description: Explosive action with Billy Zane. When the Serbian Prime Minister is assassinated, an elite special ops team must rescue the US Ambassador and pull Europe back from the brink of war. (2011)
Voyeuristic thriller with Hilary Swank. A recently single young doctor moves into a new apartment on her own, unaware that her landlord has a terrifying obsession with her. (2011)
Adventurer Allan Quatermain plunges into the unexplored recesses of the African jungles to uncover the truth behind the legends concerning the mine. Ep2
Welcome to LEGEND XTRA - your home for movies and series full of action, adventure, suspense and much more!
Challenger, Malone and Veronica see a man stumbling out of the jungle in a hail of deadly arrows, and he dies in their arms issuing a cryptic message to find a man named Pierson Rice. S3, Ep6/22
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Ecological terror. When the waters surrounding a remote island are contaminated by chemical dumping, anyone eating fish from the area are transformed into deformed murderous maniacs. (1972)

When two workers die on a Texas oil rig due to freak accidents, Walker discovers eco-terrorists are behind it and are hell-bent on destroying the rig. S3, Ep3
Action adventure. In the future, mankind lives in replica cities on Mars. When a sandstorm destroys Mars' New York, the city of Mars' Los Angeles must find a way to stop the storm. (2015)

When Roxton happens upon a hangman's noose dangling from a tree in the jungle, he's suddenly transported back to the Old West - where he finds himself at the end of the rope. S3, Ep7/22
Colt and his friend Pat's race-car is stolen after two dubious men are told the vehicle is not for sale. Guest starring David Carradine. S3, Ep11
Action thriller with Steven Seagal. A soldier from an elite military force disobeys orders and leads his men on a mission to rescue a friend who has been trapped behind enemy lines. (2016)
